name: Blackfyre
postCreateCommand: cd platform && npm install && npm run build && cp -n packages/api/.env.example packages/api/.env || true
postAttachCommand: echo '🔥 Blackfyre codespace ready. Fastest demo (no DB): cd platform && npm run demo --workspace=packages/api  →  :4001. Full stack: cd platform && npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run dev  →  :4000 (see docs/developer/local-development.md)'
